{"problem_standardized_math":"For the matrix\n\\[\nB=\n\\begin{bmatrix}\n0 & 3 & 0 & 0\\\\\n3 & 4 & 0 & 0\\\\\n0 & 0 & \\frac{7}{9} & \\frac{5}{9}\\\\\n0 & 0 & \\frac{5}{9} & \\frac{10}{9}\n\\end{bmatrix}\n\\]\nin (3.52), compute the eigenvalues of its two diagonal \\(2\\times 2\\) blocks and verify that each block has one positive and one negative eigenvalue. Then compute the eigenvalues of \\(A\\) and verify that the inertia of \\(A\\) is the same as that of \\(B\\)."}
